title: Apotheosis Addon Compat
description: Apotheosis Addon Compat is a simple addon that only adds compatibility between Apotheosis and other mods.
body:
Apotheosis/Zenith Addon Compat is a lightweight addon that extends Apotheosis by adding direct support for various creature-focused mods. This ensures integration, progression and a more immersive experience when combining them in your world.

### Compatible with:
- The Farlanders
- Mob Variants
- Rotten Creatures

![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/708e72d7a75e9e9942dd565926a87fcc741db9b6.png)
![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eadbfb9d97d4ab5d975f1004b2e8a686882e6988.png)
![c](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8985677423ba0de1791f8732fd46b2a526100b9.png)
![d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a51b3e91b1e4a7eb27bdc8436295acbdebeca5a.png)

With this addon, Apotheosis feels naturally connected to the diverse worlds these mods create, making every adventure more cohesive and engaging.
